option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
option.value: mkdir data cd data java -cp ..\hsqldb-2.7.2.jar org.hsqldb.Server

option.name: updatedContent
option.value: mkdir data cd data java -cp "%USERPROFILE%\.m2\repository\org\hsqldb\hsqldb\2.7.2\hsqldb-2.7.2.jar" org.hsqldb.Server
